title: Sneak peek: Vibe coding AI agents course with Kaggle
summary: Google Cloud Tech and Kaggle are offering a 5-day intensive course on building autonomous AI agents using natural language, called vibe coding. The course covers agent workflows, agent-to-agent communication, API integrations, and culminates in a farming simulation capstone project called Kaggriculture.
